pi_items.source: task_utils.sh line 8 defines FLOREANT_PIN='1111'; Floreant POS default

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Floreant POS 1.4 system where the default Manager PIN is verified to be '1111' (task_utils.sh, Floreant documentation). The data verified is synthetic and generated by the agent during the trajectory. The verifier logic explicitly confirms the expected conditions: the ticket must have at least one item (item_count > 0), a recorded payment transaction (transaction_count > 0), and must be voided (voided = true) as queried from the embedded Derby database.
